title: Episode 1
overview: The princess of the Royal Empire finds herself imprisoned by the demonic Hellhorde, but she resists with an iron will. That is, until the Grand Inquisitor decides to resort to more unusual forms of torture...

title: Episode 2
overview: Our noble princess is faced with a number of new faces out to torment her, including a demonic duo of oni, a tamer commanding barbaric beasts, and a towering titan of terror.

title: Episode 3
overview: The princess endures cruel torture in the form of an amusement park trip, bubble wrap, and soup dumplings. Fortunately, a white knight in shining armor shows up to rescue her.

title: Episode 4
overview: Torture Tortura is tested on her torture techniques, as she attempts to tantalize the terrifying Hell-Lord. Elsewhere, Ex experiences the excruciating ecstasy usually executed upon the princess.

title: Episode 5
overview: The fearless princess must contend with the horror of roasted marshmallows, sweltering saunas, and haunted school buildings. Meanwhile, an old foe lies in wait to exact his revenge...

title: Episode 6
overview: The Hell-Lord rewards Maomao-chan for her promotion. Meanwhile, the princess faces the horrors of gooey cheese, a routine physical, and the return of her loyal White Knight.

title: Episode 7
overview: The princess faces a two-pronged assault from a pair of adorable kitties. Maomao-chan competes in the annual field day at her preschool as her family and friends cheer her on.

title: Episode 8
overview: Youki and Inki take on the torturer promotion exam. Giant invites the princess out on a night stroll. And a new member of the Hellhorde shows up to teach the princess what real torture is!

title: Episode 9
overview: Torture enjoys some downtime in her hotel room after a long day on a business trip. Maomao-chan bakes cookies for the very first time. The princess is tortured with tea and cake.

title: Episode 10
overview: Torture takes the Princess to the beach to torture her with heated combat for a chance at freedom.

title: Episode 11
overview: Krall brings a fiendish dog to torment the princess. A powerful spell goes awry and turns all the demons of Hellholm into small children! However, Torture is determined to do her job regardless of her new stature.

title: Episode 12
overview: Vanilla invites Princess out on a playdate. The princess catches a cold. Torture worries about a corporate shake-up. And the Hell-Lord wakes up to find himself in a strange new world...

title: Episode 13
overview: The princess is plagued by memory loss, candles on a cake, a game of basketball, and her own imagination.

title: Episode 14
overview: A mysterious intruder is captured in Hellholm. The princess confronts wire puzzles and cute rabbits.

title: Episode 15
overview: The princess faces a crane game, hunger pangs, a head massage, sandwich cookies, and a case of the sleepies.

title: Episode 16
overview: The princess is tormented by hamsters, fried rice, and Vanilla's perfect plan. Torture gets sticker shock.

title: Episode 17
overview: The princess takes on rice cooker meals. Inki shares her favorite movie. Sakura learns how to make pancakes.

title: Episode 18
overview: Maomao-chan tries her hand at balloon art. The Hell-Lord, the princess, and Torture are met with afflictions.

title: Episode 19
overview: Sakura tackles her first torture. The princess sees a penguin show and goes on an adventure with Giant.

title: Episode 20
overview: The princess is tortured by handbells and faces Youki in a festival game. Vanilla gives Sakura work advice.

title: Episode 21
overview: The princess deals with fried chicken, cheap pastries, and an unexpected yet familiar face from her past.

title: Episode 22
overview: Louch turns invisible. Torture visits her parents. Vanilla gets lost. The Hell-Lord strikes up a conversation.

title: Episode 23
overview: The Hell-Lord grabs breakfast. Bowling antics. Vanilla writes a picture book. Torture finds the One Piece.

title: Episode 24
overview: The princess is interviewed for a magazine. Chaos reigns when everyone's wishes are granted overnight.
